title: Anila's Christmas Activity Pack with Colouring Books, Sticker book, Stationery Set, Colouring Pencils & 100 Reusable Stickers.(Perfect for children aged 3-8).
features: Christmas Activity Pack is ideal for children aged 3-8 years. Contains 2 Christmas Colouring books, 1 Christmas Sticker book, 3 Sheets with over 100 reusable stickers, a stationery set and a set of 6 mini colouring pencils.
Both Christmas Colouring books contain 8 pages (16 sides). The dimensions of the books are 220 x 175mm.

Christmas Sticker book contains 6 pages (12 sides) and a double page of stickers. The dimensions of the book is 260 x 205mm. You'll have 100 reusable stickers included on the sheets that you can place them wherever you choose, whether its in the sticker book or to decorate your own work!
The Christmas stationery set includes a pencil, ruler, rubber and a sharpener. Colours included in the mini colouring pencils are pink, blue, green, yellow, orange and red.
Handy carry along case with handle, perfect for travel and car journeys. The colouring books are filled with colouring & activities for keeping children entertained for hours.
